/usr/bin/ar qc librenderer.a CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_animation.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_backend.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_bsp.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_cmds.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_cmesh.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_curve.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_flares.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_font.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_image.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_init.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_light.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_main.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_marks.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_mesh.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_model.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_noise.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_scene.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_shade.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_shade_calc.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_shader.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_shadows.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_sky.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_surface.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/renderer/tr_world.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib librenderer.a
